stemHtml: After landing, tower clears you to taxi to your stand. You read back and ATC says "Monitor Ground on 118.7". What do you do?

options.a: Stop after vacating, switch to 118.7, wait for Ground.
options.b: Continue taxiing and call Ground on 118.7.
options.c: Continue taxiing per the tower clearance, switch to 118.7, and wait for Ground to call you.
options.d: Stop after vacating the runway and call Ground on 118.7.
